extract: Glaceon (Japanese: グレイシア Glacia) is an Ice-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from Eevee when leveled up near an Ice Rock or when exposed to an Ice Stone. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) It is one of Eevee's final forms, the others being Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Espeon, Umbreon, Leafeon, and Sylveon.
